sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Omna om lai, Tuuno innpi sungah
Avang lianpi tawh nang hongsam ta hi.
Tum in, tu-in tum in, omna omlai.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nitang beidek zo, ni-in liap ta hi
Hong liapta hi manlang in ah pai-in,
Omna om lai, tumin tu in tum in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong sapmi na hihleh tum in tum in.
Omna om lai, tum in tu in tum in.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Dim khin dekhi, lung damna in sungah
Manlang a na lut leh ngahlai ding hi
Omna om lai, tum in tu in tum in.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Omna om lai kong kihon laitak hi,
Pai in tum lecin na lap lai ding hi.
Omna om lai, tum in tu in tum in.

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Tum in tum in tua pawi nang aading hi,
Kii t tawntung na hai kidawn ding hi.
Tum in tum in, omna om lai.
